/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/custom_interfaces/msg/vector4__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/custom_interfaces/msg/hardwarestatus__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/custom_interfaces/msg/point__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/custom_interfaces/msg/pose__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/custom_interfaces/msg/quaternion__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/custom_interfaces/srv/multiply_two_ints__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/custom_interfaces/srv/dotproduct__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
